calendar.matters:
APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818
Off Calendar Nov-09-2011 Denied

Application Pending For Waiver Of Additional Court Fees And Costs Pursuant To G.C. 68633, Crc 3.51, 8.26, And 8.818
Off Calendar Nov-09-2011 Text Ruling

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-07-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: James Robertson, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: B. Fields, #7235

Michael Heath, Esq. for Plaintiff: Shree Jalaram Lodging LP.
Plaintiff's Witness Jina Patel was placed under oath and direct examined.
No appearance by Defendant Glen Britt.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for Judgment as follows:

Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 1139 Market St., #120, San Francisco, CA 94103.
The lease is forfeited.
Back rent - $2,850.00
Holdover Damages - $630.00
Costs - $240.00
Total - $3,720.00

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-07-2011 Assigned To Trial Court
